items.title: ADM to Present at 2025 Goldman Sachs Industrials & Materials Conference
items.description: CHICAGO, November 24, 2025--ADM (NYSE: ADM) will present at the 2025 Goldman Sachs Industrials & Materials Conference on Wednesday, Dec. 3, in New York City. The company will participate in a fireside chat at 3:30 p.m. Eastern Time.

items.title: JPMorgan and Goldman Upgrade MP Materials Amid Defense-Driven Demand Outlook
items.description: MP Materials stock looks poised for a rebound as analysts see major upside and strategic importance in U.S. defense and rare-earth supply chains.

items.title: Beat the Market the Zacks Way: Goldman Sachs, Micron, Prelude in Focus
items.description: GS stands out as Zacks showcases how its stock picks like MU and PRLD delivered strong gains despite a shaky market.

items.title: ING Group completes two risk sharing transactions
items.author: Ing Group Media Relations
items.description: ING Group successfully completed two significant risk transfer transactions, covering €10.5 billion in corporate loan portfolios, which are expected to reduce risk-weighted assets by €3.4 billion and improve capital ratios.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned in a separate acquisition context by ING Bank Śląski, with no direct impact on the main transaction details
